title: senecio guatulamensis
intro: Senecio guatulamensis, also known as Guatamalan Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio guatulamensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used in salves and creams to promote skin healing and alleviate inflammation.
